artifacts.title: Game receipt from 2022-04-13
artifacts.excerpt: @ak92501 The pictures in this paper really undersell the implications! These gaussian-activated coordinate functions don't need special init and generalize more intuitively than SIRENs on that toy 2D image reconstruction. I had to implement it myself to believe it. https://t.co/W81jxtN9pb https://t.co/Ae5DDclrIK

artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2018-08-25
artifacts.excerpt: I'm visualizing what time of day my daughter was sleeping/napping during the first year of hear life. Future parents take note: It takes about two months before newborns discovery our day/night cycle. Every datapoint is there because we were awake to enter it. https://t.co/JCB7VWQpVd
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: time, first, making, real.

artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2022-02-01
artifacts.excerpt: I'm teaching in a classroom today for the first time in forever. I don't want to miss out on how responsive people are through text chat, so I'm trying out putting the Slack chat on the main screen using a scene composed in OBS. https://t.co/jDamTdAV5F
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: time, first, making, real.

artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2023-01-24
artifacts.excerpt: Another stable diffusion trick (this time focused on reducing visual concept bleeding): boil your object descriptions down to a single vector each so that the network can't attend to the wrong combination of attributes and objects. https://t.co/JbwZMONWpE https://t.co/Cy41O4tgUT
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: time, first, making, real.

artifacts.title: Here receipt from 2018-08-27
artifacts.excerpt: 300,000 impressions later, I regret not checking my spelling or adding axis labels. Horizontal is day of life from 1 to 365; vertical is hour of day since midnight (can't remember if it goes up or down). And here's my soundcloud: https://t.co/uuqtP3LyQh

artifacts.title: Here receipt from 2022-12-15
artifacts.excerpt: One weird trick to avoid missing objects in diffusion-based text-to-image systems (without retraining): Reallocate attention over all prompt tokens so that none get ignored. Here it is on one bad and one good seed for "red cube in a blue bowl". Source: https://t.co/HYXd5GpZGx https://t.co/CC2lU2Hihh
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: here, see, good, project.
